patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD prevention (HARD CAP 1) validated 4-of-5 times in archive — CONFIRM the cap; market holds information the model misses when edge_pp < 0, even with strong F-signals (CHC@ATL, CHC@TEX, NYY@MIL, NYY@BAL precedents).

SF@LAD PLATINUM failure is 0-for-3 in archive; F3>9000 is a recurring pipeline artifact. Today Ohtani confirmed as LAD starter — key differentiator from Sasaki (05-11) and other prior starters, warranting GOLD not SKIP while still downgrading from PLATINUM.

OVERRIDE methodology validated 6+ times: confirmed elite opposing SP + large Stage 1/2 gap + stacked pipeline flags + fair_prob below 0.42 = affirmative OVERRIDE. TB@TOR (Cease) and STL@OAK (Ginn + zero STL F-signals) both meet threshold today.

Stacked-flags-only DOWNGRADE over-fires on positive-edge GOLD picks without secondary confirming signal (f5_full_delta >0.15, fair_prob <0.42, or model-market gap >12pp) — 05-12 CHC@ATL miss established this guard; applied to DET@NYM and SD@MIL today.

Home-favorite overconfidence heuristic 1: KC@CWS edge +17.51pp outside band with market at 49% (Lugo vs unproven Schultz) is the clearest case today of model over-rating home favorites >65% when market disagrees strongly.

NYY @ BAL.reasoning: Max Fried confirmed as NYY starter vs Bradish. F1_xera_gap=3.19 and F2_xwoba=0.031 directionally justified with Fried pitching. No fair_prob means market validation is impossible — grade correctly capped at C per missing-fair_prob rule. PLATINUM at 76.1% without any odds anchor is too speculative to elevate. NYY@BAL series 1-1 over last two days (BAL 3-2 on 05-11, NYY 6-2 on 05-12). CONFIRM the cap; Fried strengthens NYY direction but cannot override the missing-fair_prob safeguard.

LAA @ CLE.reasoning: Detmers (LAA) vs Parker Messick (CLE). No active F-signals, no fair_prob, grade C/0. CLE at 64.14% via home advantage is a reasonable read but Messick is unproven vs veteran Detmers. Edge missing completely removes any staking basis. Nothing in live context changes the calculus. CONFIRM SKIP.

WSH @ CIN.reasoning: Nick Lodolo (CIN) confirmed 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — PENDING is correct per small-sample SP quarantine (requires 100+). Jake Irvin (WSH) vs Lodolo with zero CIN SP quality data means F5 stage cannot be scored. WSH demolished CIN 10-4 on 05-12 but today is a structurally different SP context. PQI AGAINST provisional pick (delta=+16.8) adds mild CIN lean but insufficient without SP data. No directional pick warranted.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: Keller (PIT) vs Quintana (COL). Model barely picks PIT at 51.1% while market prices PIT at 64.74% — edge -13.64pp means HARD CAP 1 correctly fired. Market is far more bullish on PIT than the model; negative EV at market odds. f5_full_delta=0.2325 with bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked undermines late-game PIT thesis after Keller exits. Skenes shut out COL yesterday; today Keller is a lesser SP. PLATINUM at 51.1% model confidence is a grading artifact. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

PHI @ BOS.reasoning: Painter (PHI) vs Sonny Gray (BOS). Model has PHI at 78.78% — outside [0.48, 0.72] band, SKIP correctly applied. Edge +34.15pp also outside band. f5_full_delta=0.257 large (BOS wins F5 via Gray, PHI wins full via bullpen/lineup thesis). PHI won 2-1 yesterday (05-12 CONFIRM). The artificial inflation of PHI full-game confidence beyond the band limits is correctly handled by the filter. Grade B+/3 reflects underlying signal quality but band violations prevent elevation. CONFIRM SKIP.

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Griffin Jax (TB) vs Dylan Cease (TOR) — all four OVERRIDE conditions met: (1) Cease confirmed elite SP (former Cy Young contender, dominant xERA); SP edge 1.93 AGAINST TB's pick; (2) fair_prob=0.4071 below 0.42 floor, market prices TB at only 40.7%; (3) bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked; (4) f5_full_delta=0.2666 — TOR dominates F5 via Cease, TB needs late bullpen reversal. Grade D/-2 reflects grader skepticism of TB. Identical structure to 05-11 SEA@HOU Kirby OVERRIDE (validated). OVERRIDE to TOR.

DET @ NYM.reasoning: Framber Valdez (DET) vs Christian Scott (NYM, min_pa=79 small sample). Grade C/0, edge +2.67pp below 4pp band. f5_full_delta=0.0063 — nearly zero Stage 1/2 gap, structurally different from yesterday's 0.3285 OVERRIDE condition. acute_roster + confidence_downgrade stacked but per 05-12 rule, stacked flags without secondary signal (f5_full_delta <0.15, fair_prob=0.4926 above floor, model-market gap <12pp) should NOT trigger DOWNGRADE. Edge below band forces SKIP regardless. CONFIRM direction.

CHC @ ATL.reasoning: Imanaga (CHC, excellent LHP) vs JR Ritchie (ATL). HARD CAP 1 fired on -5.17pp negative edge — pre-cap A- (score 4) collapsed to B- (score 1). Imanaga is elite but market prices ATL at 55.17% on home soil; market holds information model doesn't. f5_full_delta=0.1532 (Imanaga dominates F5 at 66.6% but Stage 2 diverges). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0166 favors ATL bullpen. Negative-edge GOLD is 4-of-5 loss predictor in archive. DOWNGRADE to SKIP despite Imanaga quality.

KC @ CHW.reasoning: Seth Lugo (KC, established veteran SP) vs Noah Schultz (CWS, unproven prospect). Model has CWS at 66.83% but market prices as coin flip (49.32%) — edge +17.51pp above 15pp band triggers heuristic 1 (home favorite >65% with extreme market divergence). Market pricing reflects Lugo quality and Schultz uncertainty that the model's F3=2073.4 lineup signal overestimates. f5_full_delta=0.1482 moderate. Edge above band prevents any staking context. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

MIA @ MIN.reasoning: Max Meyer (MIA) vs Simeon Woods Richardson (MIN). Grade D/-2: SP edge 1.74 xERA AGAINST MIN pick, PQI delta=-29.4 strongly confirms MIA direction. Market prices MIA at ~53.95% (fair_prob=0.4605 for MIN). No F-signals fire for MIN. Stage 1/2 agree so no late-game reversal thesis. SKIP tier correctly applied. Meyer has a genuine SP edge today but the model's D grade already captures this. Not overriding — MIA structural team-quality limitations remain a concern. Direction highly uncertain.

SD @ MIL.reasoning: Michael King (SD) vs Jacob Misiorowski (MIL). Grade A/5 — highest on slate. Edge +5.8pp within band. F1_xera_gap=1.90* has asterisk but PQI also confirms pick (delta=+7.3), meaning HARD CAP 5 does NOT fire (cap requires F1* as sole signal without F2/F3/PQI). Misiorowski demonstrated quality despite small sample — shut out NYY 0-6 on 05-08. bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade present but per 05-12 rule, no secondary downgrade signal (f5_full_delta=0.0958 <0.15, fair_prob=0.5954 above floor). CONFIRM GOLD.

ARI @ TEX.reasoning: Ryne Nelson (ARI) vs Kumar Rocker (TEX). Three-signal GOLD bar cleanly met: F3=1591.8 >500, edge +8.34pp within band, f5_full_delta=0.0004 (Stage 1/2 perfectly aligned), no stress flags. Rocker has been hittable — CHC scored 7 off him on 05-08. ARI won 05-11 (Soroka 1-0 GOLD CONFIRM) in same series. Today's near-zero Stage 1/2 gap is the cleanest ARI@TEX setup in the archive. PQI confirms ARI (delta=-12.6). Cleanest directional read on the slate. CONFIRM GOLD.

SEA @ HOU.reasoning: Bryce Miller (SEA) confirmed 0 Statcast pitches — injury return, form unknown. PENDING is correct. Lance McCullers Jr. pitching for HOU. Provisional signals strongly favor SEA (SP edge 3.78 AGAINST HOU provisional, PQI delta=-46.9 strongly SEA). SEA won last 2 HOU games emphatically (Kirby 3-1 on 05-11 OVERRIDE win; Woo 10-2 on 05-12 OVERRIDE win). Miller post-injury effectiveness genuinely uncertain. PENDING protocol stands; directional lean toward SEA but not actionable without Miller SP data.

STL @ OAK.reasoning: Liberatore (STL) vs J.T. Ginn (OAK). Grade D/-3 — worst on slate, zero F-signals supporting STL. SP edge 1.83 xERA favors Ginn/OAK. PQI delta=+32.8 strongly confirms OAK. Market prices OAK at 59.16% (STL fair_prob=0.4084 below 0.42 floor). OAK dominates F5 at 65.93%; STL full-game thesis relies on bullpen_fatigue=True late-inning comeback. Model barely picks STL at 51.6% on zero positive evidence while every qualitative and quantitative signal says OAK. Matches 05-12 COL@PIT OVERRIDE pattern. OVERRIDE to OAK.

SF @ LAD.reasoning: Robbie Ray (SF) vs Shohei Ohtani (LAD) — Ohtani confirmed as LAD starter, key differentiator from prior failures (05-11: Sasaki lost 9-3; 05-12: different SP lost 6-2). F3=9818.6 is a pipeline artifact (matches 05-12 F3=9589.3 artifact in identical matchup). f5_full_delta=0.3329 likely reflects limited Ohtani F5 Statcast data (F1_xera_gap=2.47*) rather than genuine Ray F5 dominance. HARD CAP 3 requires p_model >0.85 — today 0.7751 does not trigger. Market at 71.58% for LAD is a strong anchor. Downgrade PLATINUM to GOLD: keep LAD direction, reduce tier given F3 artifact and SF@LAD 0-for-3 archive pattern.
